welcome.content: 👋 Thank you for taking the time to complete this questionnaire. Your responses will help to provide a holistic overview of {student_name}, including their learning profile alongside their social, emotional, mental health, speech and language and sensory needs.

context_1.question: In what professional capacity are you completing this questionnaire?
context_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

context_2.question: Which of the following best describes the institution or setting within which you support the individual?
context_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

context_3.question: How long has the student or employee been known to you in your professional capacity?
context_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

course_1.question: Please describe the individual's current course of study or job role.

metadata.section: Section B - Course or Role Profile

course_2.question: Please indicate the individual's year of study (if in Higher Education) or length of service (if in employment).

metadata.section: Section B - Course or Role Profile

course_3.question: Which of the following demands does the individual's course or role typically involve? Please select all that apply.
course_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section B - Course or Role Profile

reason_1.question: What is the principal reason for this assessment being undertaken?

options.label: Updated assessment from earlier childhood/youth report

reason_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

reason_2.question: Which existing diagnoses, if any, are recorded on file for the individual? Please select all that apply.
reason_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

reason_3.question: Has the individual previously been assessed by an Educational Psychologist?
reason_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

reason_4.question: Which other professionals, if any, are currently involved in supporting the individual? Please select all that apply.
reason_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

obs_he_1.question: How would you describe the individual's engagement with lectures or classes?
obs_he_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

obs_he_2.question: How would you describe the individual's engagement with reading lists or required materials?
obs_he_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

obs_he_3.question: To what extent does the individual meet deadlines for the submission of assignments?
obs_he_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

obs_he_4.question: How would you rate the quality of the individual's written assignments in comparison with their peers?
obs_he_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

obs_he_5.question: How does the individual's performance in timed examinations compare with their performance in coursework?
obs_he_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

obs_he_6.question: How would you describe the individual's engagement with seminar discussions or group work?
obs_he_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

obs_he_7.question: Has the individual approached you regarding mitigating circumstances or deadline extensions?
obs_he_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

obs_workplace_1.question: How would you rate the quality of the individual's written reports or emails in comparison with their peers?
obs_workplace_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

obs_workplace_2.question: How would you describe the individual's time-management in relation to workplace tasks?
obs_workplace_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

obs_workplace_3.question: How would you describe the individual's performance in meetings, including listening, contributing and following up?
obs_workplace_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

obs_workplace_4.question: How would you describe the individual's ability to manage several tasks at once?
obs_workplace_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

obs_workplace_5.question: How would you describe the individual's customer-facing or interpersonal interactions?
obs_workplace_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

obs_workplace_6.question: To what extent has the individual taken sickness absence or extended leave related to their wellbeing?
obs_workplace_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

obs_workplace_7.question: To what extent have performance reviews identified areas of difficulty or concern?
obs_workplace_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

cognition_1.question: How would you describe the individual's attention and focus during sessions such as lectures or meetings?
cognition_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section F - Cognitive / Attention / Memory observations

cognition_2.question: To what extent does the individual require information to be repeated, or appear to lose track of instructions?
cognition_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section F - Cognitive / Attention / Memory observations

cognition_3.question: To what extent does the individual take longer than their peers to complete routine work?
cognition_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section F - Cognitive / Attention / Memory observations

cognition_4.question: How would you describe the individual's reading speed in comparison with their peers?
cognition_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section F - Cognitive / Attention / Memory observations

cognition_5.question: How would you describe the individual's organisational skills, for example their use of a planner or digital tools?
cognition_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section F - Cognitive / Attention / Memory observations

cognition_6.question: To what extent does the individual seek help or clarification when needed?
cognition_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section F - Cognitive / Attention / Memory observations

behaviour_1.question: To what extent have you observed signs of anxiety in the educational or workplace setting?
behaviour_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

behaviour_2.question: To what extent have you observed signs of burnout or sustained fatigue?
behaviour_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

behaviour_3.question: To what extent have you observed signs of social isolation within the setting?
behaviour_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

behaviour_4.question: How would you describe the individual's engagement with mental-health support, such as counselling, Occupational Health or an Employee Assistance Programme?
behaviour_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

adjustments_1.question: Which adjustments or arrangements are currently in place for the individual? Please select all that apply.

options.label: Use of word processor / assistive software

adjustments_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

adjustments_2.question: Is any DSA-funded equipment or support currently in place for the individual?
adjustments_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

adjustments_3.question: Are any workplace adjustments under the Equality Act 2010 currently in place for the individual?
adjustments_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

adjustments_4.question: Has an application been made to the Access to Work scheme?
adjustments_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

impact_1.question: To what extent is the student or employee able to manage their workload independently?
impact_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

impact_2.question: To what extent do recent assessments or performance reviews give cause for concern?
impact_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

impact_3.question: To what extent are deadlines, coursework or project milestones consistently met?
impact_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

impact_4.question: Is the individual considering, or have they already applied for, a course change, year out, mitigating circumstances or change of role?
impact_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

mentoring_1.question: Has the student or employee engaged with a Specialist Mentor or Study Skills tutor?
mentoring_1.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I2 - Mentoring, Mitigation, and Pattern (additional)

mentoring_2.question: What is the individual's history of mitigating circumstances (in Higher Education) or sickness absence (in the workplace)?
mentoring_2.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I2 - Mentoring, Mitigation, and Pattern (additional)

mentoring_3.question: How would you describe the quality of the individual's group or collaborative work with peers?
mentoring_3.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I2 - Mentoring, Mitigation, and Pattern (additional)

mentoring_4.question: How would you describe the individual's independence when undertaking project, dissertation or major task work?
mentoring_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I2 - Mentoring, Mitigation, and Pattern (additional)

mentoring_5.question: Has the student or employee required deadline extensions during this academic year or quarter?
mentoring_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I2 - Mentoring, Mitigation, and Pattern (additional)

mentoring_6.question: How responsive is the individual to communications from the Disability Service or Occupational Health?
mentoring_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I2 - Mentoring, Mitigation, and Pattern (additional)

mentoring_7.question: Has the employer or institution documented the individual's adjustments formally?
mentoring_7.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I2 - Mentoring, Mitigation, and Pattern (additional)

mentoring_8.question: How frequently do one-to-one tutorial or supervision meetings take place with the individual?
mentoring_8.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I2 - Mentoring, Mitigation, and Pattern (additional)

mentoring_9.question: Please identify any specific module or project that has presented a particular point of difficulty for the individual.

metadata.section: Section I2 - Mentoring, Mitigation, and Pattern (additional)

mentoring_10.question: Please identify any specific area in which the student or employee has demonstrated a notable strength.

metadata.section: Section I2 - Mentoring, Mitigation, and Pattern (additional)

mentoring_11.question: Has the student or employee raised any wellbeing concerns during this year?
mentoring_11.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I2 - Mentoring, Mitigation, and Pattern (additional)

mentoring_12.question: Has the student or employee declined any support that has been offered to them?
mentoring_12.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I2 - Mentoring, Mitigation, and Pattern (additional)

mentoring_13.question: Has the student or employee changed course or role during this academic year or quarter?
mentoring_13.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

metadata.section: Section I2 - Mentoring, Mitigation, and Pattern (additional)

summary_1.question: Please provide the most recent academic or performance feedback for the individual, quoting directly where possible.

summary_2.question: Is there anything further you consider relevant to the assessment?

summary_3.question: Please provide the name and professional role of the person completing this form.

summary_4.question: For how long have you been observing this student or employee in your professional role?
summary_4.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

summary_5.question: Are there other members of staff who could provide a corroborating view of the individual?
summary_5.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

summary_6.question: Are there any cultural or linguistic considerations the assessor should be aware of?
summary_6.text_prompt: Or describe in your own words:

closing_message.content: Thank you for completing the questionnaire. Your responses have been recorded and will be reviewed by the educational psychology team.

complete.content: Thank you so much for completing this assessment!
